sn35.129:1.1:
1
On one occasion the Venerable Ānanda was dwelling at Kosambı in Ghosita's Park. Then the householder Ghosita approached the Venerable Ānanda … and said to him:
"Venerable Ānanda, it is said, ‘diversity of elements, diversity of elements.’
In what way, venerable sir, has the diversity of elements been spoken of by the Blessed One?"
